name: review-gate
description: MOVED — review-gate is now Empanel and ships from its own repo. Install the replacement with `/plugin marketplace add smarzban/empanel` then `/plugin install empanel@empanel` (skills: gate, repo-audit; they drive the `@empanel/cli` npm package — `npm i -g @empanel/cli@0`). This 1.7.1 release is a pointer only and the final review-gate release from this marketplace; installed 1.7.x copies keep working but receive no further updates here.
